name: Marvel Hulk Kids' Pillow Buddy - The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™
description: Gift your young superhero a cool new bedtime buddy with this Marvel Hulk Kids' Pillow Buddy from The Marvel Collection by Pillowfort™. Made from plush recycled polyester fabric, this pillow buddy figural doll is designed as the Hulk for a fan-favorite look. Great for pairing with other Marvel heroes on their bed, it makes a great gift for birthdays and more.
